ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal
En: Tioumoutiri was a Revacholian colony on Iilmaraa. The suzerainty's population was mostly Iilmaraan Areopagites -- up to 97%. The region was known for its tobacco export. Hence the name.
Zh: 特拜科是瑞瓦肖在伊尔玛的殖民地。那里的人口基本上都是伊尔玛的艾瑞奥帕吉特人——高达97%。那片区域以烟草出口闻名，也因此得名。

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal

Zh: 够了。这些香烟一点也不重要。

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal
En: Oh, you do! The butts you saw had a silhouette of a boy wearing a kofia hat -- a tobacco picker. This boy is the Tioumoutiri brand logo. Contemporary Revacholians prefer Drouin (a local blend from the southern islands) or Astra, a legendary cigarette from Graad. Tioumoutiri is favoured by older men who like its old fashioned paper filter tips, insane amount of tar and the sweet smells of colonialism and halva.
Zh: 哦，当然了！你看见的烟蒂上有一个戴着科菲亚帽的男孩——一个烟草采摘工人。这个男孩是特拜科的品牌标志。同时代的瑞瓦肖人更喜欢德鲁安（南部岛屿的一个本土牌子）或者是阿斯特拉，一种来自格拉德的传奇香烟。喜欢特拜科的人年龄偏大，他们钟情老式纸过滤嘴，过量的焦油，还有殖民主义和芝麻蜜饼的香甜。

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal
En: Nothing is unimportant, detective.

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal
En: Those? He points to them. "A smoking assailant who favours Tioumoutiri to Astra or Drouin? Cigarette butts are everywhere. This is a common brand for old men."
Zh: “那些吗？”他用手指了指。“一个抽烟的袭击者，相比阿斯特拉或者是德鲁安，更喜欢特拜科？这里到处都是烟头。这个牌子在年纪大的人中间比较流行。”

ConvTitle: LANDS END ORB / lands end shot viscal
